text.title: Autonomous Agents Failure Modes
text.summary: Five recurring antipatterns when shipping autonomous agents.

antipattern.description: Unbounded loop on production critical path. Token quota explodes; incident.
antipattern.repair: Default max_iterations=15; emit "max reached" terminal record on hit.

antipattern.description: Non-idempotent tool without dedup key; retry double-charges or duplicates writes.
antipattern.repair: Add dedup key derived from args OR add human checkpoint before call.

antipattern.description: Code execution outside sandbox. Agent rm -rf the wrong directory.
antipattern.detector: sandbox_required=true but no sandbox endpoint configured at runtime.
antipattern.repair: Block deploy. Wire e2b/docker before any code-execution tool is exposed.

antipattern.description: Vague terminal condition ("agent decides it's done"); ReAct loops indefinitely until cap.
antipattern.detector: terminal_condition string contains "agent decides" / "when done" / "thinks complete".
antipattern.repair: Replace with deterministic check (schema validates, test exits 0, rule check passes).

antipattern.description: Empty "Observation: None" returned by tool; LLM confuses what to do next.
antipattern.detector: tool-return logs contain empty strings or "None".
antipattern.repair: Always return non-empty observation; "Success: no output" if action has no payload. Include step counter.

section.title: Prompt-injection markers
section.p: Long-horizon agents may receive tool returns that contain instructions. Treat as data; caps + idempotency rules from 01-core-rules.xml override.

section.title: Human checkpoint
section.p: For first deployment, named eng owner reviews the spec before merge; sandbox URL is verified at deploy time, not assumed.
